reviews.review_description:
I tried in sitting mode  but I had to quit the game after 5 minutes.
I spent 4 minutes to take the first thing from the drawer.
If you crunch near an object, you return in high position.

I gave it another shot in standing mode and it was enjoyable.
Little problems during the movements but it seems very interesting.
A short mysterious, horror, thriller game. The story line is good. I want to know what will be in the next part of the game and the game graphics is awesome.
Yes, the crouching is troublesome, but the story, episodes,clue board, and game are very good. I’m looking forward to more of this one. Well worth it.

Seriously brillant game , good clever jump scares well timed and the mini investigations are very entertaining and makes u think, would like to see the crouch mechanic fixed as it just bounces u back up and down and u can't stay crouch to open draws and pick up items.  Great job development team

An excellent narrative adventure, which will leave you jumping with its stunning atmosphere.
Top-notch graphics and sound immerse you in a detective and horror story.
The game consists of three sequences repeated to form the dozen chapters of this first volume... And yes, we're hoping for more!
- Purely narrative sequences immerse you in the story, in the form of beautifully designed comic book pages.
- Search and clue-gathering sequences, where you search various locations in magnificent 3D.
- Clue synthesis sequences, where you must figure out how to match the right clues to the right branches of the investigation on a board.
Your mobile device guides you with various instructions such as searching the room, opening a door, hiding, collecting clues, or finding a code...
The game offers all the comfort options to avoid motion sickness, making it very comfortable to play.
But the only language available is English. This is the game's only flaw, along with a few height-management bugs (crouching can be problematic at times).
But nothing that will prevent you from fully enjoying this highly successful and polished experience in every way. A favorite!
My video test in french: https://youtu.be/iVwDe3iNa0w
No brain....for the price...it's a must buy! Great atmosphere and good graphics. It could become amazing with few updates

The game is quite short and the graphics are pretty solid too. It does end on a cliffhanger though. Other than that the controls are also nice. It's not very repetitive either since finding items isn't your only goal. Overall a pretty good game imo

The game is really nice. The story is amazing each episode is designed very well. I left scared at a lot of places. I recommend it for those who like horror thriller games. 

Be a detective and solve the case.

The gameplay is really nice I have to find clues and think as a detective and after every episode I need to plot the clues on a board. Hope to see a better version of the game on Full release! Overall, I would say it is worth it
